message:
feat(obligation): convert SendPermit protocol to session_protocol! macro (bd-3u5d3.3)

Replace hand-written send_permit module with a session_protocol! macro
invocation, proving the macro generates correct typestate code. All 9
existing session type tests pass unchanged against the macro-generated
module. Added backward-compatible type aliases (SenderSession,
ReceiverSession) and re-exported session_protocol in proc_macros module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
